steps.title: Interpret the horizontal intercept
steps.content:
An $x$-intercept is where the graph crosses the horizontal axis. In this context, the vertical value is height above the water, so the $x$-intercept means

$$y=0$$

steps.title: Use the graph value
steps.content: At the graph's $x$-intercept, the diver's height above the water is $0$ meters, which means the diver hits the water at that time. The graph shows that time as $1.6$ seconds. The answer is B.
